description: Submit, view, and manage bug reports within the org.

operations.name: report-bug
operations.description: Walk a member through submitting a structured bug report.

collection.description: The collection the bug was encountered in. If null, the reporter specifies during the interview.

title.description: Short summary of the bug. If null, collected during the interview.

severity.description: Bug severity. If null, collected during the interview.

context.description: Additional context from the calling collection (e.g., task name, session details).

reported.description: Whether the bug report was successfully submitted.

bug_id.description: The assigned bug ID, if successfully reported.

error.description: Error description if reported is false.

operations.name: view-bugs
operations.description: List and filter submitted bug reports.

collection.description: Filter bugs by collection name. If null, show all.

status.description: Filter by bug status. If null, show all statuses.

count.description: Total number of bugs matching the filter.

operations.name: forward-bug
operations.description: Forward a triaged bug report to an external system or collection server.

forwarded.description: Whether the bug was successfully forwarded.

error.description: Error description if forwarded is false.
